onboarding.welcome: Hi! Let's set up the bot for solving LeetCode problems.
onboarding.enter_session: Enter LEETCODE_SESSION cookie. How to get it: 1. Open leetcode.com and log in 2. DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies → leetcode.com 3. Copy the LEETCODE_SESSION value
onboarding.enter_csrf: Now enter csrftoken cookie. In the same Cookies, copy the csrftoken value.
onboarding.done: ✅ All set! Use /daily or /random to start.
onboarding.already_configured: You're already set up! Use /settings to change preferences, /daily or /random for problems.

errors.leetcode_unavailable: ⚠️ LeetCode is not responding, try again later.
errors.ai_unavailable: ⚠️ AI is temporarily unavailable, try again in a minute.
errors.ai_overloaded: ⚠️ Claude servers are overloaded (529). Try again in a couple minutes.
errors.no_problems_available: All problems matching your filters are solved! Try expanding filters in /settings.

cookie.expired: ⚠️ Cookies have expired! You need to update them.
cookie.instruction: How to get cookies: 1. Open leetcode.com → log in 2. DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies 3. Copy LEETCODE_SESSION and csrftoken
cookie.reminder: 🔔 Cookies haven't been updated for over 5 days. We recommend updating in /settings → Cookies.
